title: Add M4 Worker projections and parity
summary: Prove Node Worker and browser Worker parity for M4 authoritative hashes and read-only lamp, evidence, obligation, crisis, director and dawn-review projections.
acceptance: Node Worker and browser Worker consume the same M4 command stream and produce matching authoritative world hashes and read-model hashes at checkpoint ticks
Worker projections include read-only lamp evidence obligation town-rule crisis director recovery and dawn-review basis metadata without UI mutation authority
Projection diagnostics record seed scenario id first mismatch tick snapshot bytes read-model bytes projection bytes and message latency counts
Existing M1 M2 and M3 worker-smoke coverage remains intact
No public Worker protocol redesign platform save UI schema migration dependency or M5 content is introduced without a separate reviewed gate

history.details: Created by WM-0061 M4 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.
Implemented M4 Worker/headless parity using existing Worker protocol surfaces, added read-only M4 basis projections, browser Worker smoke coverage, diagnostics artifact, docs, and required checks.

verified: No blocking findings. Confirmed M4 Worker parity reuses existing protocol surfaces, Node/browser Workers match authoritative M4 hashes at checkpoint ticks, projections are read-only and basis-versioned, existing M1-M3 worker-smoke coverage remains, and required checks plus quality pass.
Verified by reviewer; worker parity and browser smoke gates passed; ready for main merge

objective: Gate M4 through Worker/headless parity while keeping every client-facing M4 surface read-only.
forbiddenPaths: public Worker protocol redesign without separate architecture approval
public save compatibility platform save UI schema migration or codec dependency
projection-cache authority or client-side repair path
benchmarkImpact: Records M4 Worker latency snapshot bytes read-model bytes projection bytes and parity overhead; baseline updates wait for WM-0070.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; client-engineer may inspect read-model usage but cannot own simulation authority.
rollbackModel: Revert M4 Worker parity additions and artifacts while keeping existing M1/M2/M3 Worker smoke coverage intact.
ownerGate: Compare authoritative hashes rather than UI visual output
Reuse existing protocol surfaces where feasible
Block on public protocol save schema dependency UI authority M5 or client repair scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Worker parity and authority boundaries are not suitable for Spark.

review.summary: No blocking findings. Confirmed M4 Worker parity reuses existing protocol surfaces, Node/browser Workers match authoritative M4 hashes at checkpoint ticks, projections are read-only and basis-versioned, existing M1-M3 worker-smoke coverage remains, and required checks plus quality pass.

integration.summary: Verified by reviewer; worker parity and browser smoke gates passed; ready for main merge
